mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_wallets (user_id, balance, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{balance}, datetime('now'), datetime('now'))
mapper.update: UPDATE user_wallets SET balance = balance - 1, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND balance >= 1
UPDATE user_wallets SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE user_id = #{userId}
